Chat Edit: '✅ Run the UI end-to-end now: Launch RawrXD-AgenticIDE.exe, select llama3.2:3b from the model dropdown, send a chat prompt, and I’ll capture/confirm token streaming shows up in the chat panel logs.
🔁 Finish/compile a complete InferenceEngine integration test that programmatically loads the Ollama blob and asserts streamToken events are emitted (automated, non-GUI).
🛠️ Improve test tooling to automatically select dropdown + simulate user input in the GUI (requires small UI automation script).'

Chat Edit: 'Update the file dialog filter in AIChatPanel's 'Load Model...' action to show both GGUF files (*.gguf) AND Ollama blob files (sha256-* blobs) in the same browse dialog, allowing users to manually select either type while keeping automatic blob detection working in the dropdown

What to change:
The QFileDialog filter currently shows only "GGUF Models (*.gguf)"
Change it to "AI Models (*.gguf sha256-*);;All Files (*.*)"
This lets users browse to ollama/blobs/ and pick sha256-10da04ee... files directly
Result: One unified "Load Model" dialog that handles both GGUF files AND Ollama blobs, while your automatic detection still populates the dropdown.'

Chat Edit: 'Recommendation: Ensure a GGUF model is selected in the UI before running @analyze commands, as the engine correctly detected that no local model was currently resident in memory.


These should be workable with the blobs as well!'

Chat Edit: '### ❌ Missing Integration
1. **Unified Workflow**: No single method that connects all steps
2. **MainWindow Integration**: generateCode() in MainWindow_v5 is incomplete
3. **Automatic Compilation**: No compilation after code generation
4. **Completion Notification**: No notification when workflow completes'

Chat Edit: '### 1. Enhanced AgenticExecutor Workflow Method
Add a unified method that handles the complete workflow:
- Load model if needed
- Generate code from specification
- Create source file
- Compile with appropriate compiler
- Return success/failure with detailed results

### 2. Enhanced MainWindow Integration
Update MainWindow_v5 to:
- Integrate with AgenticExecutor
- Provide UI for specifying code generation tasks
- Show compilation progress
- Display completion notification

### 3. Compiler Detection and Selection
Enhance compilation logic to:
- Detect available compilers (clang, MSVC, MASM)
- Select appropriate compiler based on file type
- Handle compilation errors gracefully

### 4. Completion Notification System
Add notification system that:
- Tracks workflow progress
- Shows real-time status
- Provides detailed completion report
'

Chat Edit: '@agent Try Again'

Chat Edit: 'The application started successfully. Let me provide a summary of all the fixes made in this session:

Summary of Build Fixes
1. AutonomousFeatureEngine Methods
Updated signatures to match what AutonomousIntelligenceOrchestrator expects:

discoverMissingFeatures() → Returns QVector<QJsonObject> with no arguments
suggestFixForBug(const BugReport& bug) → Takes BugReport struct, returns QJsonObject
generateTestsForProject(const QString&) → Returns QVector<QJsonObject>
suggestFixesForAllBugs() → Returns QVector<QJsonObject> with no arguments
2. Missing Signal
Added testsGenerated(const QVector<QJsonObject>& tests) signal to AutonomousFeatureEngine

3. GeneratedTest Struct Fields
Fixed field names in generateTestsForProject to match the actual struct:

testId, testName, testCode, framework, language, coverage, reasoning
4. Missing Includes
Added #include <QDir> to autonomous_feature_engine.cpp
Added #include "intelligent_codebase_engine.h" to autonomous_feature_engine.h (for BugReport)
Added #include <QDir>, #include <QThread>, #include <windows.h> to autonomous_model_manager.cpp
5. AutonomousModelManager Implementation
Added missing methods:

autoDetectBestModel(const QString& taskType, const QString& language)
analyzeSystemCapabilities()
recommendModelForCodebase(const QString& projectPath)
6. Qt6 QMutexLocker Template Fix
Changed QMutexLocker to QMutexLocker<QMutex> in inference_engine.cpp

7. CMakeLists.txt Updates
Added to RawrXD-QtShell target:

src/qtapp/ThemeManager.h
src/qtapp/ThemeManager.cpp
src/qtapp/ThemeConfigurationPanel.h
src/qtapp/ThemeConfigurationPanel.cpp
The RawrXD-QtShell.exe is now successfully building and running! 🎉


Load model isnt seeming to work properly!'
